post.subject: 40 hours
post.body:
Im just in from work and i feel really good. It feels strange. Work doesnt normally make me feel really good. Like I havent done anything other than work. My manager and I discussed the hours that I'm going to do over the next 3 weeks and I'm working just about every day. Starting with 40 hours next week. This has made me feel good... Im as confused as you are. Im working on the deli counter and I like it. Its easy. Im gettin the hang of it. People are nice. Manager's nice and I'm gettin' plenty of hours. I actually like working here, but fucking cant stand the store in Derry! Ive worked 6 hours a day for the last three days and it hasnt been too bad at all. Though Im doing 8 tomorrow and 7 on Saturday, then no less than 8 all of next week! Hopefully these 8 hour shifts will go ok. 

This of course means that I will be getting lots and lots of money! YEEEOOO!!
